proven.claim: Proven: "diff" appears in help (line 544) AND is implemented as
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P5
; LINE: 544
; Proven: "diff" appears in help (line 544) AND is implemented as
; case "diff": runDiff(rest) in the switch.
(declare-const diff_documented Int)
(declare-const diff_implemented Int)
(assert (= diff_documented 1))
(assert (= diff_implemented 1))
(assert (not (= diff_documented diff_implemented)))
(check-sat)
; Expected: unsat — diff is both documented and implemented
